narrative:
Turtlecreek Twp H (precinct in Warren County) has 932 registered voters, with 49.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 42.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 35.1 percentage points.
